label: Soil sensor — WH52 support
items: Ecowitt WH52 multi-parameter soil sensors are now supported alongside the WH51. Connect picks them up automatically — channels with calibrated EC or a soil temperature reading register as WH52.
Conductivity tile now renders in µS/cm for WH52 (calibrated) and as a raw ADC integer for WH51 (unitless, relative only) — tap the small ? to see what each value means.
